item.title: Half a Gigabyte of Ads 摘要
item.description:
A PC Gamer article highlights a web page that initially loads 37MB and downloads nearly half a gigabyte of ads within five minutes, described as irresponsible and unprofessional. The author suggests browsers should implement default caps on page loads, such as 5MB, and require explicit consent for additional content to protect users from excessive data usage and poor performance.
标签: web, performance, ads, browsers, data usage, user experience, web development, privacy, content delivery, internet

item.title: ‘Good, I’m Glad He’s Dead.’ 摘要
item.description:
The article discusses a blog post attributed to former U.S. President Donald Trump, where he expresses satisfaction over the death of Robert Mueller, calling it good and stating Mueller can no longer hurt innocent people. The author interprets this as a sign of declining mental faculties in the elderly, leading to loss of propriety and confusion, such as feeling the need to sign messages. The piece sarcastically suggests bookmarking Trump's post for future reference when he dies, implying others might similarly celebrate his passing.
标签: politics, Donald Trump, Robert Mueller, blog, controversy, social commentary, dementia, death, U.S. politics, media

item.title: Mux — Video API for Developers 摘要
item.description:
Mux is a video infrastructure platform that enables developers to integrate and scale video capabilities into websites, platforms, and AI workflows. It provides tools like transcripts, clips, and storyboards for applications such as summarization, translation, content moderation, and tagging. Mux also maintains Video.js, the web's most popular open-source video player, with version 10 being a complete architectural rebuild currently in beta. Trusted by companies like Patreon, Substack, and Synthesia, Mux offers a free tier and a promotional code for additional credit.
标签: video, infrastructure, API, developers, open-source, AI, transcripts, content-moderation, scalability, web-development
